pi_items.source: Code analysis of scripts/setup_openproject.sh shows a synthetic project 'DevOps Automation' initialized with the identifier 'devops-automation'.
Code analysis of tasks/integrate_git_repository/setup_task.sh confirms the script dynamically creates a bare git repository at this exact path inside the OpenProject container.
tasks/integrate_git_repository/setup_task.sh runs 'git init --bare' for the repository. verifier.py also confirms the configured module's scm_type should contain 'git'.

privileged_info_summary: The environment uses purely synthetic data. The project 'DevOps Automation' is initialized during OpenProject setup with identifier 'devops-automation'. The expected bare Git repository is dynamically created by the task setup script inside the container at '/var/lib/openproject/git/devops.git'. The expected version control type is Git.
